Cinematic Immersive / AI consulting for women leaders

The room goes quiet when the AI question lands.

Then someone has to lead. Lakecia Gunter helps women leaders step into that frame with strategy, language, and nerve.

Start the conversation

Scene one

A board packet. A platform shift. A competitor making noise. A team waiting for direction. The cinematic version of AI leadership is not robots and spectacle—it is the close-up of a leader deciding what comes next.

The guide

Lakecia brings the lived texture of Microsoft CTO leadership, Intel executive operations, DoD engineering discipline, public-company governance, and ROAR’s insistence that women be heard clearly.

The turn

Together, you turn fog into a stance: what to build, what to avoid, what to fund, what to say, and how to carry the room.

01

Enterprise proof

Former Microsoft CTO experience and $1B+ platform scale.

02

Board judgment

Independent Director at IDEX Corporation (NYSE).

03

Human voice

ROAR host and advocate for women leading out loud.

Ready for the next room?

Bring the pressure, the ambition, and the open questions. Lakecia will help you turn them into a leadership position.
